data.body: Starting WS-C (executor + run-state). WS-C1: WORKFLOW_RUN/WORKFLOW_STEP event types. Design: run-state events attach to the TARGET ticket; per-key LWW maps workflow_runs[run_id] + workflow_steps[run_id][step_id], LAZY/ADDITIVE (no shape change for non-workflow tickets; ticket_state is additionalProperties:true). HLC+UUID convergence is automatic (filename sort = HLC+UUID order, last-write-per-key wins). Added to KNOWN_EVENT_TYPES so compaction squashes into SNAPSHOT (process_snapshot restores all compiled_state keys -> preserved).
